text: I'm extremely ill — high fever that won't break, severe muscle aches, bad dry cough, completely wiped out. 3 day(s) and getting worse, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. Breathing is very laboured.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 3 day(s), and it seems to be escalating. I feel a bit warm, possibly mildly feverish.
label: influenza/mild

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 1 day(s), and it's been the same for a while now.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I know it's likely nothing but I haven't felt right and it's worrying me.
label: non-infectious

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 6 day(s). I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 4 day(s), and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it. Breathing is very laboured.

text: I have a chesty cough with a bit of phlegm and some tightness in my chest. 4 day(s) now, and it seems to be escalating.

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 2 day(s) — nothing terrible yet, and it's been the same for a while now.

text: My chest really hurts when I cough or take a deep breath. Quite a bit of phlegm, fever, feeling weak. 10 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 3 day(s), and I can't seem to shake it, which frightens me.

text: Sharp pain in my chest when I breathe in, productive cough, fever. Worsened over 13 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better.

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 9 day(s), deteriorating, though I think I'm slowly getting better. I'm burning up.
